title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Heavy Electricals - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Heavy Electricals - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
